title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 18–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Garp, Luffy, Kinemon as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: two of my underlings and one H1Hi have vanished.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a 98% chance you all did this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Here, in Wano, one joins the strong,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: or one spends their life running from them. Choose.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On break next issue. Publication resumes in the double issue.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: After too long, a fight side-by-side

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 11 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
